name: Lumbar Spine CT
description: CT of the lumbar spine for evaluation of bony anatomy and degenerative disease

findings.technique: CT of the lumbar spine was performed without contrast in axial, sagittal, and coronal reconstructions.
findings.comparison: No prior studies available for comparison.

sections.name: Vertebral Bodies
sections.content: The lumbar vertebral bodies from L1 through L5 demonstrate [normal height / no compression fracture / no bony lesion]. The bone density is [normal / no osteoporosis].

sections.name: Disc Spaces
sections.content: The intervertebral disc spaces from L1-L2 through L5-S1 demonstrate [preserved height / no significant disc space narrowing / no vacuum phenomenon]. No disc herniation.

sections.name: Spinal Canal
sections.content: The spinal canal is [adequate in diameter / no central canal stenosis]. No bony stenosis or posterior element hypertrophy causing canal compromise.

sections.name: Neural Foramina
sections.content: The bilateral neural foramina are [patent / adequate in size / no foraminal narrowing]. No bony foraminal stenosis.

sections.name: Facet Joints
sections.content: The bilateral facet joints demonstrate [no hypertrophy / no arthropathy / no malalignment]. The joint spaces are [preserved / normal].

sections.name: Pedicles and Pars
sections.content: The bilateral pedicles are [intact / no fracture / no lysis]. No pars interarticularis defect.

sections.name: Transverse Processes
sections.content: The transverse processes are [intact / no fracture / no avulsion]. No abnormal mineralization.

sections.name: Soft Tissues
sections.content: The paraspinal soft tissues are [unremarkable / no abnormal soft tissue mass]. No paraspinal calcification.

impression:
1. Normal lumbar spine CT.
2. No fracture, dislocation, or significant degenerative change identified.
author: RadReport Templates
